sections.title: Projects
sections: This section highlights active and developing projects, giving a quick overview of what each one is for, what stage it is in, and where it is headed as the systems continue to grow.

items.title: Themadhood.github.io
description: A scalable web platform designed to host and organize all Themadhood projects and systems.
Built as a fast recovery solution after previous hosting platforms became unavailable, with plans to evolve into a full-stack system.
about: A scalable recovery-first web platform with a planned transition to full-stack architecture.

items.title: Evolutionary-Tree
description: Stores collections of real, fantasy, and other kinds of data in one place.
Designed to make evolutionary paths and related information easier to explore, compare, and understand across both science and fantasy settings.
about: A flexible data project for exploring evolutionary paths and related information across science and fantasy settings.

features: Structured storage for real and fantasy data
Clear viewing of evolutionary paths and related information
statusDetails: Stored information categories and layout are still being refined.
